extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: all “By” rows are Nil and excluded; the “Against our Company,” “Against our Directors,” and “Against our Promoters” rows are Nil, while “Against our Subsidiaries” is Nil for criminal, tax, and statutory/regulatory actions and shows five material civil litigation matters with an aggregate quantified amount of ₹45.75 million. Accordingly, criminal, regulatory, and tax counts against the relevant entities are each zero, and the quantified group litigation amount is ₹45.75 million, or ₹4.575 crore, including the subsidiary civil matters; no promoter/director personal amounts are included. The contingent-liabilities table is consolidated and dated September 30, 2024, but provides component amounts only—bank guarantees of ₹503.32 million and no letter-of-credit amount—and does not state a Total row, so the required stated total is not disclosed. No company-wide top-customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the only percentages in the section concern items such as subsidiaries, contractors, and other operational metrics, not top-five or top-ten customers. The source monetary tables use ₹ million; ₹45.75 million ÷ 10 = ₹4.575 crore, while the contingent-liability amount is left null because no stated total is provided.
